center.name: 康區
center.summary: 康區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括雪鸽，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: gradaria occurs in the mountains of eastern Tibet and from eastern Nan Shan (Qinghai) to Yunnan and extreme northern Myanmar

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: gradaria occurs in the mountains of eastern Tibet and from eastern Nan Shan (Qinghai) to Yunnan and extreme northern Myanmar
